id: "f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2345-fabc-678901234567"
handle: auth_flow_config_wso2_cloud_disambiguation
name: WSO2 Cloud Authentication Flow with Disambiguation
flowType: AUTHENTICATION
nodes:
  - id: start
    type: START
    onSuccess: choose_auth

  # --- Choose social provider ---
  - id: choose_auth
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_001
          label: "Sign in to WSO2 Cloud"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_001
          components:
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_google
              label: "Continue with Google"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_github
              label: "Continue with GitHub"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
    prompts:
      - action:
          ref: action_google
          nextNode: google_auth
      - action:
          ref: action_github
          nextNode: github_auth

  # --- Google ---
  - id: google_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "456efc02-bad3-47bb-bd87-01cc94f8388c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GoogleOIDCAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- GitHub ---
  - id: github_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "372a20db-a946-4b40-add0-0049d15a5f9c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GithubOAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- Check if user is ambiguous (exists in multiple OUs) ---
  # Runs only when userAmbiguous=true (set by OAuthExecutor).
  # When not ambiguous, skips to org_registration_prompt.
  - id: check_user_state
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: IdentifyingExecutor
      mode: resolve
      inputs:
        - identifier: sub
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: org_registration_prompt
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userAmbiguous }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: org_registration_prompt

  # --- Disambiguation: user exists in multiple OUs ---
  - id: prompt_disambiguate
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_title
          label: "Select your organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_subtitle
          label: "Your account exists in multiple organizations. Please select one to continue."
          variant: BODY_2
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_disambig
          components:
            - id: select_ou
              ref: ouHandle
              type: SELECT
              label: "Organization"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Select your organization"
              options: []
            - type: ACTION
              id: action_select_ou
              label: "Continue"
              variant: PRIMARY
              eventType: SUBMIT
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: select_ou
            identifier: ouHandle
            type: SELECT
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_select_ou
          nextNode: resolve_federated_user

  # --- Resolve disambiguated user (sets AuthenticatedUser) ---
  - id: resolve_federated_user
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: FederatedAuthResolverExecutor
      inputs:
        - identifier: ouHandle
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: auth_assert
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate

  # --- OU provisioning (new social users) ---
  - id: org_registration_prompt
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_title
          label: "Create Your Organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_subtitle
          label: "Set up your organization to get started"
          variant: BODY
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_org
          components:
            - id: input_ou_name
              ref: ouName
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Name"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter your organization name"
            - id: input_ou_handle
              ref: ouHandle
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Handle"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter a unique handle (e.g., my-org)"
            - eventType: SUBMIT
              id: action_create_org
              label: "Create Organization"
              type: ACTION
              variant: PRIMARY
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: input_ou_name
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouName
            required: true
          - ref: input_ou_handle
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouHandle
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_create_org
          nextNode: ou_creation
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userEligibleForProvisioning }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: auth_assert

  - id: ou_creation
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: OUExecutor
    onSuccess: provisioning

  - id: provisioning
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: ProvisioningExecutor
    onSuccess: auth_assert

  # --- Final ---
  - id: auth_assert
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: AuthAssertExecutor
    onSuccess: end

  - id: end
    type: END

id: "d4e5f6a7-b8c9-0123-defa-govid000app1"
name: "Gov.ID Portal"
description: "Government Identity Portal"
url: "http://development-thunder-thunder-idp.openchoreoapis.localhost:19080"
is_registration_flow_enabled: false
auth_flow_id: "b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-govid00flow1"
theme_id: "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-govid0theme1"
layout_id: "c3d4e5f6-a7b8-9012-cdef-govid0layot1"
certificate:
  type: "NONE"
  value: ""
inbound_auth_config:
  - type: "oauth2"
    config:
      client_id: "GOVID_PORTAL"
      redirect_uris:
        - "http://development-thunder-thunder-idp.openchoreoapis.localhost:19080/callback"
      grant_types:
        - "authorization_code"
        - "refresh_token"
      response_types:
        - "code"
      token_endpoint_auth_method: "none"
      pkce_required: true
      public_client: true
      token:
        access_token:
          validity_period: 3600
          user_attributes:
            - "given_name"
            - "family_name"
            - "email"
            - "name"
        id_token:
          validity_period: 3600
          user_attributes:
            - "given_name"
            - "family_name"
            - "email"
            - "name"
      scope_claims:
        profile:
          - "name"
          - "given_name"
          - "family_name"
        email:
          - "email"
          - "email_verified"

args:
if [ ! -f /data/.initialized ]; then
  echo "Copying database directory from image..."
  cp -r /opt/thunder/repository/database/* /data/
  touch /data/.initialized
  echo "Database initialization complete"
else
  echo "Database already initialized"
fi
initContainers.name: init-database

handle: auth_flow_config_wso2_cloud_disambiguation
name: WSO2 Cloud Authentication Flow with Disambiguation
flowType: AUTHENTICATION
nodes:
  - id: start
    type: START
    onSuccess: choose_auth

  # --- Choose social provider ---
  - id: choose_auth
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_001
          label: "Sign in to WSO2 Cloud"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_001
          components:
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_google
              label: "Continue with Google"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_github
              label: "Continue with GitHub"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
    prompts:
      - action:
          ref: action_google
          nextNode: google_auth
      - action:
          ref: action_github
          nextNode: github_auth

  # --- Google ---
  - id: google_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "456efc02-bad3-47bb-bd87-01cc94f8388c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GoogleOIDCAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- GitHub ---
  - id: github_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "372a20db-a946-4b40-add0-0049d15a5f9c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GithubOAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- Check if user is ambiguous (exists in multiple OUs) ---
  # Runs only when userAmbiguous=true (set by OAuthExecutor).
  # When not ambiguous, skips to org_registration_prompt.
  - id: check_user_state
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: IdentifyingExecutor
      mode: resolve
      inputs:
        - identifier: sub
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: org_registration_prompt
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userAmbiguous }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: org_registration_prompt

  # --- Disambiguation: user exists in multiple OUs ---
  - id: prompt_disambiguate
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_title
          label: "Select your organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_subtitle
          label: "Your account exists in multiple organizations. Please select one to continue."
          variant: BODY_2
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_disambig
          components:
            - id: select_ou
              ref: ouHandle
              type: SELECT
              label: "Organization"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Select your organization"
              options: []
            - type: ACTION
              id: action_select_ou
              label: "Continue"
              variant: PRIMARY
              eventType: SUBMIT
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: select_ou
            identifier: ouHandle
            type: SELECT
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_select_ou
          nextNode: resolve_federated_user

  # --- Resolve disambiguated user (sets AuthenticatedUser) ---
  - id: resolve_federated_user
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: FederatedAuthResolverExecutor
      inputs:
        - identifier: ouHandle
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: auth_assert
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate

  # --- OU provisioning (new social users) ---
  - id: org_registration_prompt
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_title
          label: "Create Your Organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_subtitle
          label: "Set up your organization to get started"
          variant: BODY
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_org
          components:
            - id: input_ou_name
              ref: ouName
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Name"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter your organization name"
            - id: input_ou_handle
              ref: ouHandle
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Handle"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter a unique handle (e.g., my-org)"
            - eventType: SUBMIT
              id: action_create_org
              label: "Create Organization"
              type: ACTION
              variant: PRIMARY
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: input_ou_name
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouName
            required: true
          - ref: input_ou_handle
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouHandle
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_create_org
          nextNode: ou_creation
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userEligibleForProvisioning }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: auth_assert

  - id: ou_creation
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: OUExecutor
    onSuccess: provisioning

  - id: provisioning
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: ProvisioningExecutor
    onSuccess: auth_assert

  # --- Final ---
  - id: auth_assert
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: AuthAssertExecutor
    onSuccess: end

  - id: end
    type: END

id: "f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2345-fabc-678901234567"
handle: auth_flow_config_wso2_cloud_disambiguation
name: WSO2 Cloud Authentication Flow with Disambiguation
flowType: AUTHENTICATION
nodes:
  - id: start
    type: START
    onSuccess: choose_auth

  # --- Choose social provider ---
  - id: choose_auth
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_001
          label: "Sign in to WSO2 Cloud"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_001
          components:
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_google
              label: "Continue with Google"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_github
              label: "Continue with GitHub"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
    prompts:
      - action:
          ref: action_google
          nextNode: google_auth
      - action:
          ref: action_github
          nextNode: github_auth

  # --- Google ---
  - id: google_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "456efc02-bad3-47bb-bd87-01cc94f8388c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GoogleOIDCAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- GitHub ---
  - id: github_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "372a20db-a946-4b40-add0-0049d15a5f9c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GithubOAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- Check if user is ambiguous (exists in multiple OUs) ---
  # Runs only when userAmbiguous=true (set by OAuthExecutor).
  # When not ambiguous, skips to org_registration_prompt.
  - id: check_user_state
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: IdentifyingExecutor
      mode: resolve
      inputs:
        - identifier: sub
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: org_registration_prompt
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userAmbiguous }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: org_registration_prompt

  # --- Disambiguation: user exists in multiple OUs ---
  - id: prompt_disambiguate
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_title
          label: "Select your organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_subtitle
          label: "Your account exists in multiple organizations. Please select one to continue."
          variant: BODY_2
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_disambig
          components:
            - id: select_ou
              ref: ouHandle
              type: SELECT
              label: "Organization"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Select your organization"
              options: []
            - type: ACTION
              id: action_select_ou
              label: "Continue"
              variant: PRIMARY
              eventType: SUBMIT
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: select_ou
            identifier: ouHandle
            type: SELECT
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_select_ou
          nextNode: resolve_federated_user

  # --- Resolve disambiguated user (sets AuthenticatedUser) ---
  - id: resolve_federated_user
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: FederatedAuthResolverExecutor
      inputs:
        - identifier: ouHandle
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: auth_assert
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate

  # --- OU provisioning (new social users) ---
  - id: org_registration_prompt
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_title
          label: "Create Your Organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_subtitle
          label: "Set up your organization to get started"
          variant: BODY
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_org
          components:
            - id: input_ou_name
              ref: ouName
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Name"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter your organization name"
            - id: input_ou_handle
              ref: ouHandle
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Handle"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter a unique handle (e.g., my-org)"
            - eventType: SUBMIT
              id: action_create_org
              label: "Create Organization"
              type: ACTION
              variant: PRIMARY
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: input_ou_name
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouName
            required: true
          - ref: input_ou_handle
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouHandle
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_create_org
          nextNode: ou_creation
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userEligibleForProvisioning }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: auth_assert

  - id: ou_creation
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: OUExecutor
    onSuccess: provisioning

  - id: provisioning
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: ProvisioningExecutor
    onSuccess: auth_assert

  # --- Final ---
  - id: auth_assert
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: AuthAssertExecutor
    onSuccess: end

  - id: end
    type: END

id: "f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2345-fabc-678901234567"
handle: auth_flow_config_wso2_cloud_disambiguation
name: WSO2 Cloud Authentication Flow with Disambiguation
flowType: AUTHENTICATION
nodes:
  - id: start
    type: START
    onSuccess: choose_auth

  # --- Choose social provider ---
  - id: choose_auth
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_001
          label: "Sign in to WSO2 Cloud"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_001
          components:
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_google
              label: "Continue with Google"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_github
              label: "Continue with GitHub"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
    prompts:
      - action:
          ref: action_google
          nextNode: google_auth
      - action:
          ref: action_github
          nextNode: github_auth

  # --- Google ---
  - id: google_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "456efc02-bad3-47bb-bd87-01cc94f8388c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GoogleOIDCAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- GitHub ---
  - id: github_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "372a20db-a946-4b40-add0-0049d15a5f9c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GithubOAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- Check if user is ambiguous (exists in multiple OUs) ---
  # Runs only when userAmbiguous=true (set by OAuthExecutor).
  # When not ambiguous, skips to org_registration_prompt.
  - id: check_user_state
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: IdentifyingExecutor
      mode: resolve
      inputs:
        - identifier: sub
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: org_registration_prompt
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userAmbiguous }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: org_registration_prompt

  # --- Disambiguation: user exists in multiple OUs ---
  - id: prompt_disambiguate
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_title
          label: "Select your organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_subtitle
          label: "Your account exists in multiple organizations. Please select one to continue."
          variant: BODY_2
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_disambig
          components:
            - id: select_ou
              ref: ouHandle
              type: SELECT
              label: "Organization"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Select your organization"
              options: []
            - type: ACTION
              id: action_select_ou
              label: "Continue"
              variant: PRIMARY
              eventType: SUBMIT
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: select_ou
            identifier: ouHandle
            type: SELECT
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_select_ou
          nextNode: resolve_federated_user

  # --- Resolve disambiguated user (sets AuthenticatedUser) ---
  - id: resolve_federated_user
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: FederatedAuthResolverExecutor
      inputs:
        - identifier: ouHandle
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: auth_assert
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate

  # --- OU provisioning (new social users) ---
  - id: org_registration_prompt
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_title
          label: "Create Your Organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_subtitle
          label: "Set up your organization to get started"
          variant: BODY
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_org
          components:
            - id: input_ou_name
              ref: ouName
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Name"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter your organization name"
            - id: input_ou_handle
              ref: ouHandle
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Handle"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter a unique handle (e.g., my-org)"
            - eventType: SUBMIT
              id: action_create_org
              label: "Create Organization"
              type: ACTION
              variant: PRIMARY
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: input_ou_name
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouName
            required: true
          - ref: input_ou_handle
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouHandle
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_create_org
          nextNode: ou_creation
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userEligibleForProvisioning }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: auth_assert

  - id: ou_creation
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: OUExecutor
    onSuccess: provisioning

  - id: provisioning
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: ProvisioningExecutor
    onSuccess: auth_assert

  # --- Final ---
  - id: auth_assert
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: AuthAssertExecutor
    onSuccess: end

  - id: end
    type: END

id: "f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2345-fabc-678901234567"
handle: auth_flow_config_wso2_cloud_disambiguation
name: WSO2 Cloud Authentication Flow with Disambiguation
flowType: AUTHENTICATION
nodes:
  - id: start
    type: START
    onSuccess: choose_auth

  # --- Choose social provider ---
  - id: choose_auth
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_001
          label: "Sign in to WSO2 Cloud"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_001
          components:
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_google
              label: "Continue with Google"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
            - eventType: TRIGGER
              id: action_github
              label: "Continue with GitHub"
              type: ACTION
              variant: SOCIAL
    prompts:
      - action:
          ref: action_google
          nextNode: google_auth
      - action:
          ref: action_github
          nextNode: github_auth

  # --- Google ---
  - id: google_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "456efc02-bad3-47bb-bd87-01cc94f8388c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GoogleOIDCAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- GitHub ---
  - id: github_auth
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    properties:
      idpId: "372a20db-a946-4b40-add0-0049d15a5f9c"
      allowAuthenticationWithoutLocalUser: true
      allowCrossOUProvisioning: true
    executor:
      name: GithubOAuthExecutor
    onSuccess: check_user_state

  # --- Check if user is ambiguous (exists in multiple OUs) ---
  # Runs only when userAmbiguous=true (set by OAuthExecutor).
  # When not ambiguous, skips to org_registration_prompt.
  - id: check_user_state
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: IdentifyingExecutor
      mode: resolve
      inputs:
        - identifier: sub
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: org_registration_prompt
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userAmbiguous }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: org_registration_prompt

  # --- Disambiguation: user exists in multiple OUs ---
  - id: prompt_disambiguate
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_title
          label: "Select your organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_disambig_subtitle
          label: "Your account exists in multiple organizations. Please select one to continue."
          variant: BODY_2
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_disambig
          components:
            - id: select_ou
              ref: ouHandle
              type: SELECT
              label: "Organization"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Select your organization"
              options: []
            - type: ACTION
              id: action_select_ou
              label: "Continue"
              variant: PRIMARY
              eventType: SUBMIT
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: select_ou
            identifier: ouHandle
            type: SELECT
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_select_ou
          nextNode: resolve_federated_user

  # --- Resolve disambiguated user (sets AuthenticatedUser) ---
  - id: resolve_federated_user
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: FederatedAuthResolverExecutor
      inputs:
        - identifier: ouHandle
          type: TEXT_INPUT
          required: true
    onSuccess: auth_assert
    onIncomplete: prompt_disambiguate

  # --- OU provisioning (new social users) ---
  - id: org_registration_prompt
    type: PROMPT
    meta:
      components:
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_title
          label: "Create Your Organization"
          variant: HEADING_1
        - align: center
          type: TEXT
          id: text_org_subtitle
          label: "Set up your organization to get started"
          variant: BODY
        - type: BLOCK
          id: block_org
          components:
            - id: input_ou_name
              ref: ouName
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Name"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter your organization name"
            - id: input_ou_handle
              ref: ouHandle
              type: TEXT_INPUT
              label: "Organization Handle"
              required: true
              placeholder: "Enter a unique handle (e.g., my-org)"
            - eventType: SUBMIT
              id: action_create_org
              label: "Create Organization"
              type: ACTION
              variant: PRIMARY
    prompts:
      - inputs:
          - ref: input_ou_name
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouName
            required: true
          - ref: input_ou_handle
            type: TEXT_INPUT
            identifier: ouHandle
            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_create_org
          nextNode: ou_creation
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userEligibleForProvisioning }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: auth_assert

  - id: ou_creation
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: OUExecutor
    onSuccess: provisioning

  - id: provisioning
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: ProvisioningExecutor
    onSuccess: auth_assert

  # --- Final ---
  - id: auth_assert
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: AuthAssertExecutor
    onSuccess: end

  - id: end
    type: END

            required: true
        action:
          ref: action_create_org
          nextNode: ou_creation
    condition:
      key: "{{ context.userEligibleForProvisioning }}"
      value: true
      onSkip: auth_assert

  - id: ou_creation
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: OUExecutor
    onSuccess: provisioning

  - id: provisioning
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: ProvisioningExecutor
    onSuccess: auth_assert

  # --- Final ---
  - id: auth_assert
    type: TASK_EXECUTION
    executor:
      name: AuthAssertExecutor
    onSuccess: end

  - id: end
    type: END

args:
if [ ! -f /data/.initialized ]; then
  echo "Copying database directory from image..."
  cp -r /opt/thunder/repository/database/* /data/
  touch /data/.initialized
  echo "Database initialization complete"
else
  echo "Database already initialized"
fi
initContainers.name: init-database
